common.offline: You're offline. Some features may be unavailable.

trustBadges.pdpaDesc: Your data is handled in accordance with privacy regulations
trustBadges.encryptedDesc: All conversations are encrypted for your safety

login.heading: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Sign in to Healthier Sabah
login.desktopSubtitle: Your safe space is just a sign-in away. We're here whenever you need us.

register.heading: Create Your Account
register.subtitle: Your 24/7 Mental Health Companion
register.passwordsMismatch: Passwords don't match yet — no worries, take your time
register.spamHint: After registering, please check your spam or junk folder for the verification email.
register.desktopSubtitle: Healthier Sabah provides a secure and private environment for your mental health journey. Your conversations are protected and confidential.

forgotPassword.heading: Reset Your Password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
forgotPassword.success: If an account exists with this email, a reset link has been sent.
forgotPassword.desktopSubtitle: Forgetting a password happens to everyone. We'll help you get back to your safe space in no time.

resetPassword.heading: Set Your New Password
resetPassword.subtitle: Choose a strong password to keep your account secure.
resetPassword.expiredSubtitle: This reset link has expired or is no longer valid. Please request a new one.
resetPassword.desktopSubtitle: Set a new password and get back to your safe space. We're here for you every step of the way.

verifyEmail.sentTo: We've sent a verification link to
verifyEmail.sentToSuffix: . Please check your inbox to confirm your account.
verifyEmail.spamHint: Didn't receive the email? Check your spam folder or try resending below.
verifyEmail.resendSuccess: Verification email sent! Check your inbox.
verifyEmail.resendError: Could not resend. Please try again.
verifyEmail.verifiedSubtitle: You can now log in and start your journey with Healthier Sabah.
verifyEmail.expiredSubtitle: No worries — verification links expire for your security. Request a new one below.

ssoConsent.heading: Almost there
ssoConsent.subtitle: Before we begin, we need your consent to ensure your data is handled safely.
ssoConsent.consentPrefix: I consent to Healthier Sabah collecting and processing my data in accordance with the
ssoConsent.consentSuffix: . My conversations and personal information will be kept confidential and secure.

errors.EMPTY_FIELDS: Please enter both email and password.
errors.INVALID_EMAIL: Please enter a valid email address
errors.INVALID_CREDENTIALS: Incorrect email or password. Please try again.
errors.RATE_LIMITED: Too many attempts. Please try again in a few minutes.
errors.EMAIL_TAKEN: This email is already registered. Try logging in.
errors.WEAK_PASSWORD: Please make sure your password meets all the requirements above
errors.CONSENT_REQUIRED: Please agree to the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy to continue.
errors.SERVER_CONSENT_REQUIRED: Consent is required to create an account.
errors.SESSION_EXPIRED: Your session has expired. Please request a new reset link.
errors.NETWORK: Unable to connect. Please check your internet and try again.
errors.SERVER: Something went wrong on our end. Please try again shortly.
errors.GENERIC: Something went wrong. Please try again.

flash.PASSWORD_RESET_SUCCESS: Password reset successful. Please log in with your new password.
flash.SESSION_EXPIRED: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.

errorPage.heading: Something went wrong
errorPage.description: We hit an unexpected issue. Don't worry — your data is safe. You can try again or head back to the login page.
